spec.name: The Cave Turning-Point
spec.description: The mud is getting deeper. You are wondering, 'Would it be an idea to leave, before I disappear?'. To the south you notice a flat round stone is blocking the way. To the west you can see mud.

south.description: You can see an opening behind the stone.

extra_descs.description: The stone looks very uninteresting. BUT as you are about to turn away, you see a strip of light coming through a small hole. Conclusion: The stone is moveable.
